questionHtml:
Which equation is an example of decarboxylation?

A. Pyruvate → Acetyl CoA + CO2

B. CO2 + H2O H2CO3

C. CH4 + 2O2 CO2 + 2H2O

D.

meta.title: Which equation is an example of decarboxylation? A. Pyruvate → Acetyl CoA + CO2 B. CO2 + H2O H2CO3 C. CH4 + 2O2 CO2 + 2H2O D.
